message:
feat(reactor): implement token slab allocator for waker mapping

Add SlabToken and TokenSlab to src/runtime/reactor/token.rs:

- SlabToken: compact identifier with index and generation counter
  - Pack/unpack to usize for reactor API compatibility (epoll_event.data)
  - Generation tracking prevents ABA problems with freed slots

- TokenSlab: O(1) slab allocator for wakers
  - Free list for efficient slot reuse
  - Generation counter incremented on removal to invalidate stale tokens
  - insert/get/get_mut/remove/contains operations
  - retain() for bulk removal with predicate
  - iter() for iteration over occupied entries

17 tests covering:
- Token pack/unpack round-trip
- Insert, get, remove operations
- Generation-based ABA prevention
- Slot reuse after removal
- Double remove handling
- Invalid index/generation handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
